title: P3 COORDINATORS - 211info
text: LATINO NETWORK P3 COORDINATORS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides play groups, kindergarten readiness, and leadership development (focusing on parents' engagement within the school setting). 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: -Play and Learn Groups: Pregnant individuals in any trimester and ages 0-5 -Early Kindergarten Transition (EKT)/Parent Cafe: Must have a child who will enter or attend a participating school Hours: Varies by event Email (503) 283-6881 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 283-6881 Luz Villanueva [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: -Play and Learn Groups: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties -EKT and Parent Cafe: Portland Public School District (Rigler or Kelly Elementary School) Services: Children's Play Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Leadership Development * Hispanic/Latino Community School Readiness Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADVOCACY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS AL KINDER EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS APRENDEMOS EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - COLEGIO DE PADRES/PARENTS COLLEGE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ESCALERA EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - ESCALERA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CRECIENDO JUNTOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MILPA GUN VIOLENCE PREVENTION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PADRINOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SOÑANDO JUNTOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - UNIDOS FOR OREGON LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - COMMUNITY HEALING INITIATIVE LEGAL SERVICES - PRESCHOOL FOR ALL NAVIGATOR SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CONEXIONES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - NINTH GRADE COUNTS UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
